'''thaloso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyphectomy|kyphectomy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-l-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyphectomy|kyphectomy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thaloso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæleseth|thæleseth]] || [[word:thælesej|thælesej]] || [[word:thælesesh|thælesesh]] || [[word:thælese|thælese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thalolosoth|thalolosoth]] || [[word:thalolosoj|thalolosoj]] || [[word:thalolososh|thalolososh]] || [[word:thaloloso|thaloloso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalosoth|thalosoth]] || [[word:thalosoj|thalosoj]] || [[word:thalososh|thalososh]] || [[word:thaloso|thaloso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalofsoth|thalofsoth]] || [[word:thalofsoj|thalofsoj]] || [[word:thalofsosh|thalofsosh]] || [[word:thalofsof|thalofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thalosotho|thalosotho]] || [[word:thalosojo|thalosojo]] || [[word:thalososho|thalososho]] || [[word:thalosoko|thalosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thalosoth|thalosoth]] || [[word:thalosoj|thalosoj]] || [[word:thalososh|thalososh]] || [[word:thaloso|thaloso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thalosothol|thalosothol]] || [[word:thalosojol|thalosojol]] || [[word:thalososhol|thalososhol]] || [[word:thalosokol|thalosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thalosothotho|thalosothotho]] || [[word:thalosojojo|thalosojojo]] || [[word:thalososhosho|thalososhosho]] || [[word:thalosoko|thalosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thalosothon|thalosothon]] || [[word:thalosojon|thalosojon]] || [[word:thalososhon|thalososhon]] || [[word:thalosokon|thalosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thalosothoro|thalosothoro]] || [[word:thalosojoro|thalosojoro]] || [[word:thalososhoro|thalososhoro]] || [[word:thalosokoro|thalosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
